title: Better Skins
description: Better Skins is a modpack focused on improving player and mob appearances, offering enhanced customization, smoother models, and richer visual detail without changing core gameplay.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ace6e16b1a6b67d58b0edbab3735eff39b83b31.png)

🎯 Overview

Better Skins is a lightweight visual modpack dedicated to making Minecraft’s characters and creatures look better than ever. It enhances skins, models, and textures to bring more personality and expressiveness to every entity in the game — from players to villagers to mobs.

👕 Player Customization

This pack gives players more freedom to express themselves. Improved skin rendering, layered textures, and compatibility with advanced skin formats make every character stand out with detail and style. Whether you’re going for realistic, fantasy, or stylized looks, your skin will shine in any environment.

🧟 Mob Visual Upgrades

Better Skins also refreshes the appearance of Minecraft’s creatures with smoother animations, higher-quality models, and improved texture resolution. The result is a more lively and dynamic world that still feels authentically “Minecraft.”
